tools.name: Freenotepad
tools.title: Notepad
tools.seoTitle: Free Online Notepad — No Signup, Autosave in Browser
tools.metaDesc: Free online notepad that works in your browser. Autosave, markdown, no signup. Write notes instantly without creating an account.
tools.h1: Free Online Notepad — distraction-free writing in your browser
tools.hero: Open a notepad in one click. Autosave keeps your work safe across refreshes. Markdown support for formatting. No signup, no account, no ads.
features: Instant autosave to browser local storage
Markdown formatting support (bold, italic, headings, lists)
No signup, no account, no ads
howItWorks: Open freenotepad.app in any browser
Start typing — no setup needed
Content autosaves to your browser as you type
Export as .txt or .md when you want to save externally
useCases: Quick drafts before pasting into a longer document
Copying text between applications without formatting
tools.comparison: Unlike Google Docs or Notion, Freenotepad requires no account and loads in under a second. Unlike system note apps (Apple Notes, Samsung Notes), it works on any device with a browser. For ongoing note libraries, Obsidian or Notion are better. For immediate "grab a notepad" needs, Freenotepad is faster.
tools.privacyNote: Every character stays in your browser. Nothing is uploaded. Notes persist locally until you explicitly clear them.
faqs: Is Freenotepad really free?
Yes. 100% free with no signup, no paid tier, no ads, and no feature limits.
Where are my notes stored?
In your browser's local storage, on your device only. Nothing is synced to a cloud or server.
Can I access my notes on another device?
Not directly — notes are per-device by design for privacy. Export as .txt or .md and transfer manually if needed.
Does Freenotepad support markdown?
Yes. Standard markdown syntax (bold, italic, headings, lists, links, code) is supported for formatted writing.
What happens if I clear browser data?
Notes saved to local storage will be cleared too. Export important notes as files for long-term keeping.
Does it work on mobile?
Yes. Freenotepad is fully responsive and works on phones, tablets, and desktops. Installable as a PWA for offline use.

tools.name: Freepage
tools.title: Document Writer
tools.seoTitle: Free Online Document Writer — Rich Text Editor Without Signup
tools.metaDesc: Free browser document writer with rich-text formatting. Headings, lists, links, images, tables. Export DOCX and PDF. No account needed.
tools.h1: Free Document Writer — rich-text editing without the Google account
tools.hero: A full rich-text document editor in your browser. Headings, bold and italic, lists, links, images, tables. Exports to DOCX and PDF. No signup.
features: Dark mode, works offline after first load
howItWorks: Open freepage.app
Start writing with full formatting controls in the toolbar
Document autosaves as you type
Export to DOCX or PDF when ready to share
useCases: Writing blog post drafts with formatting
tools.comparison: Compared to Google Docs, Freepage has no account requirement and no cloud sync — your documents stay on your device. For team collaboration, Google Docs is still the right choice. For individual formatted writing, Freepage is faster to start and more private.
tools.privacyNote: Documents live in your browser's local storage. Export to DOCX or PDF for permanent keeping.
faqs: Is Freepage really free?
Yes. Completely free, no signup, no paid tier, no ads, no watermarks.
Can I export to Microsoft Word format?
Yes. Freepage exports to .docx which opens in Microsoft Word, Google Docs, LibreOffice, and Apple Pages.
Is there real-time collaboration?
No. Freepage is designed for individual writing without the complexity of shared editing. For team collaboration, use Google Docs.
Can I paste content from Word or Google Docs?
Yes. Paste from other sources and formatting is preserved where possible.
Does Freepage work offline?
Yes. After the first page load, Freepage works without an internet connection as a Progressive Web App.
Where are my documents saved?
In your browser's local storage by default. Use the export button to download a .docx or .pdf copy to your device.

tools.name: Freesheet
tools.title: Spreadsheets
tools.seoTitle: Free Online Spreadsheet — No Account, Formulas, CSV Export
tools.metaDesc: Free browser spreadsheet with formulas like SUM, AVG, VLOOKUP. No signup. Export to CSV or XLSX. Works offline after first load.
tools.h1: Free Online Spreadsheet — formulas and calculations without Google
tools.hero: A lightweight browser spreadsheet for formulas, running totals, and simple tables. Standard functions (SUM, AVG, IF, VLOOKUP, COUNT) supported. No account.
features: Standard spreadsheet functions (SUM, AVG, IF, VLOOKUP, COUNT, MAX, MIN, etc.)
Copy-paste to and from Excel or Google Sheets
howItWorks: Open freesheet.app
Type data into cells like any spreadsheet
Use formulas starting with = (e.g., =SUM(A1:A10))
Export to CSV or XLSX when ready
tools.comparison: Compared to Google Sheets, Freesheet is lighter weight and doesn't require a Google account. It's not designed for heavy analytics or multi-user collaboration — for those, Sheets or Excel are better. For everyday "I need to add up some numbers" work, Freesheet is faster.
tools.privacyNote: Spreadsheet data stays in your browser. Export to CSV or XLSX to save externally.
faqs: Is Freesheet free?
Yes. 100% free with no signup and no usage limits.
Which formulas are supported?
Common spreadsheet functions: SUM, AVG, COUNT, MIN, MAX, IF, VLOOKUP, CONCAT, LEN, ROUND, and many more.
Can I import an Excel file?
Yes. Open .xlsx files directly, or copy-paste a range from Excel or Google Sheets.
How large a sheet can Freesheet handle?
Up to a few thousand rows comfortably. For larger datasets, use Excel or Google Sheets.
Does it have charts?
Not yet. For charts, pair with Excel or export the CSV to a visualization tool.
Is there cross-device sync?
No. Export to CSV or XLSX and transfer manually for cross-device use.

tools.name: Freeslides
tools.title: Presentations
tools.seoTitle: Free Online Presentation Maker — No Account Needed
tools.metaDesc: Free in-browser presentation builder. Slides, text, images, speaker notes. Export to PDF. No signup, no download.
tools.h1: Free Online Slide Builder — presentations without PowerPoint or Keynote
tools.hero: Build slide decks in your browser. Text, images, speaker notes, layout presets. Export to PDF. No account, no app install.
features: Add, reorder, and delete slides easily
Layout presets (title, content, two-column, image + text)
howItWorks: Open freeslides.app
Add slides and choose layouts
Add text, images, and speaker notes
Export as PDF for presenting or sharing
useCases: Quick pitch decks for informal sharing
tools.comparison: Compared to PowerPoint and Keynote, Freeslides doesn't need a software install. Compared to Google Slides, it doesn't need an account. For heavy design work or polished animations, PowerPoint/Keynote still win. For quick decks, Freeslides is faster.
tools.privacyNote: Slides are saved in your browser. Export to PDF for permanent keeping.
faqs: Is Freeslides free?
Yes. Completely free with no signup, watermarks, or feature limits.
Can I export to PowerPoint format?
Freeslides currently exports to PDF. For PowerPoint format, use PowerPoint's own import from PDF or Google Slides.
Does it have animations and transitions?
Basic transitions are supported. For advanced animations, PowerPoint or Keynote remain better fits.
Can I present directly in the browser?
Yes. Full-screen presentation mode is built in.
What image formats does it accept?
JPG, PNG, WebP, SVG, and GIF.
Is there template gallery?
A small set of layout presets is included. For extensive template libraries, use a dedicated presentation tool.

tools.name: Freemergepdf
tools.title: PDF Merger
tools.seoTitle: Free PDF Merger Online — No Signup, No Upload, No Watermark
tools.metaDesc: Free online PDF merger. Combine multiple PDFs into one. No signup, no file size limit, no watermark, no upload to any server.
tools.h1: Free Online PDF Merger — combine PDFs without uploading
tools.hero: Merge multiple PDFs into a single file. Drag to reorder pages. No signup, no daily limits, no watermarks. Files never leave your browser.
features: Merge unlimited PDFs in one operation
No file size limit (bound only by device memory)
howItWorks: Open freemergepdf.app
Drop or select PDF files to merge
Drag to reorder if needed
Click Merge and download the combined PDF
useCases: Combining scanned receipts for expense reports
Merging multi-chapter documents into one file
Creating single-file portfolios from separate PDFs
tools.comparison: Smallpdf and iLovePDF offer similar merging but limit free-tier usage to 2 files per day and upload your PDFs to their servers. Freemergepdf has no usage cap and never uploads. For basic merging, Freemergepdf is faster and more private. For advanced features like OCR or compression, Smallpdf has the broader feature set.
tools.privacyNote: PDFs never leave your browser. All merging happens client-side using JavaScript. No upload, no server storage.
faqs: Is Freemergepdf really free with no limits?
Yes. Unlimited merges per day, unlimited file count per merge, unlimited file size. No watermarks.
Are my PDFs uploaded to a server?
No. Files are processed entirely in your browser. They never leave your device.
What is the max file size?
Bounded by your device's available memory. Most users can comfortably merge PDFs totaling hundreds of megabytes.
Can I reorder pages before merging?
Yes. Drag files into any order before merging.
Is the merged PDF compressed?
The output preserves each source PDF's quality. For compression, pair with a dedicated PDF compressor.
Does it work offline?
Yes. After the first load, Freemergepdf is installable as a PWA and works fully offline.

tools.name: Freeimagetopdf
tools.title: Image to PDF
tools.seoTitle: Free Image to PDF Converter Online — JPG/PNG to PDF, No Upload
tools.metaDesc: Convert JPG, PNG, or WebP images to a single PDF in your browser. No signup, no upload, no watermark. Free and unlimited.
tools.h1: Free Image to PDF Converter — JPG and PNG to PDF in your browser
tools.hero: Convert multiple images into a single PDF file. Supports JPG, PNG, WebP. No signup, no upload to servers, no watermark.
features: Accepts JPG, PNG, WebP, and most common image formats
Combine multiple images into one PDF
howItWorks: Open freeimagetopdf.app
Drop images or click to select
Arrange in desired order
Click Convert and download the PDF
useCases: Assembling phone-scanned receipts into a single expense-report PDF
Turning scanned document pages into a single PDF
tools.comparison: Smallpdf and iLovePDF offer similar conversion but require signup after a few uses and upload your images. Freeimagetopdf has no usage limits and processes everything locally. For OCR on scanned images, dedicated services like Smallpdf or Adobe Acrobat are better. For pure image-to-PDF conversion, Freeimagetopdf is simpler and free.
tools.privacyNote: Images stay in your browser. Conversion happens client-side with no server upload.
faqs: Is Freeimagetopdf free with no limits?
Yes. No daily limits, no signup, no watermarks.
What image formats does it accept?
JPG, PNG, WebP, and most browser-supported image formats.
Can I change the order of pages?
Yes. Drag images into any order before conversion.
Is image quality preserved?
Yes. Images are embedded at original quality. For smaller file sizes, compress images first with Freeimagecompressor.
Are images uploaded to a server?
No. All processing is client-side in your browser.
How many images can I combine?
No artificial limit. Bounded by browser memory — typically dozens to hundreds of images.

tools.name: Freepdftoimage
tools.title: PDF to Image
tools.seoTitle: Free PDF to Image Converter — PDF to PNG/JPG in Browser
tools.metaDesc: Convert PDF pages to PNG or JPG images in your browser. High-quality output. No signup, no upload, no watermark. Free.
tools.h1: Free PDF to Image Converter — PDF pages to PNG or JPG
tools.hero: Extract every PDF page as a high-quality PNG or JPG image. Configurable quality. No signup, no upload, no watermark. All client-side.
features: Convert PDF pages to PNG or JPG
Download individual pages or all at once
howItWorks: Open freepdftoimage.app
Drop or select a PDF file
Choose PNG or JPG output and quality
Download extracted images individually or as a ZIP
useCases: Sending a single PDF page as a chat image without a PDF viewer
Creating web-ready thumbnails from PDF content
Extracting figures or charts from a PDF
Creating social-media previews from PDF content
tools.comparison: Smallpdf, iLovePDF, and similar services upload your PDFs to their servers. Freepdftoimage runs locally in your browser so files stay private. For batch PDF-to-image on hundreds of files, dedicated desktop tools may be more convenient. For individual PDFs, Freepdftoimage is the simplest option.
tools.privacyNote: PDFs are processed in your browser. Nothing is uploaded. Extracted images download directly to your device.
faqs: Is Freepdftoimage free?
Yes. Free, unlimited, with no signup or watermarks.
What quality are the output images?
Configurable. Default is 150 DPI which is suitable for screens. Increase for print quality.
Can I choose PNG or JPG?
Yes. PNG preserves transparency and offers lossless quality. JPG gives smaller files for photographic content.
Are PDFs uploaded?
No. All processing is client-side in your browser.
Can I extract a single page?
Yes. After processing, download individual pages or all as a ZIP.
What PDF versions are supported?
Most standard PDF versions (1.4 through 2.0). Encrypted or password-protected PDFs need to be decrypted first.

tools.name: Freeimagecompressor
tools.title: Image Compressor
tools.seoTitle: Free Online Image Compressor — Reduce JPG/PNG Without Quality Loss
tools.metaDesc: Compress JPG and PNG images up to 80% with live quality preview. No signup, no upload limits, no watermarks. Free.
tools.h1: Free Image Compressor — reduce file size without quality loss
tools.hero: Compress JPG and PNG images with a live quality slider. Typical results: 60-85% file size reduction with no visible quality loss. No signup, no upload.
features: Reduce JPG and PNG file sizes up to 80%
Live quality slider with before/after preview
howItWorks: Open freeimagecompressor.app
Drop images or click to select
Adjust quality slider while seeing live preview
Download compressed versions
useCases: Shrinking images to fit message attachment limits
Creating smaller versions for social media uploads
Reducing asset sizes in apps and presentations
tools.comparison: TinyPNG uploads your images and has a free-tier file size limit. ImageOptim is macOS-only. Squoosh (Google) is fully client-side and excellent for advanced tuning but has more complexity. Freeimagecompressor is simpler for everyday compression and works on any platform.
tools.privacyNote: Images are compressed in your browser with the Canvas API. Nothing is uploaded.
faqs: Is Freeimagecompressor really free?
Yes. No signup, no limits, no watermarks.
How much can I reduce file size?
60-85% for typical JPG photos without visible quality loss. PNG with transparency: 40-70%.
Are images uploaded?
No. Everything happens in your browser with the Canvas API.
Can I compress multiple images at once?
Yes. Drop multiple images and apply a single quality setting to all.
What formats are supported?
JPG, PNG, and WebP. Output is typically JPG or PNG depending on whether transparency is needed.
Does it work on mobile?
Yes. Fully responsive and installable as a PWA on iOS and Android.

tools.name: Freecropimage
tools.title: Image Cropper
tools.seoTitle: Free Online Image Cropper — Any Aspect Ratio, No Signup
tools.metaDesc: Free browser image cropper with presets for Instagram, Twitter, YouTube, LinkedIn. No signup. No upload. Works on any device.
tools.h1: Free Image Cropper — any aspect ratio, no upload
tools.hero: Crop images to any aspect ratio with presets for Instagram, Twitter, YouTube, LinkedIn, and more. No signup, no upload, no watermark.
features: Aspect ratio presets for all major social media
howItWorks: Open freecropimage.app
Drop or select an image
Choose a preset or enter custom aspect ratio
Drag the crop box and download the result
useCases: Creating Instagram posts from existing photos
Cropping profile photos to exact square
Cropping images for print at specific ratios
Preparing LinkedIn cover images at the right size
tools.comparison: Online editors like Canva or Adobe Express offer cropping plus more design features but require accounts. Freecropimage is a single-purpose tool for when you just need to crop quickly. For extensive editing, Canva is the broader platform.
tools.privacyNote: Cropping happens in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.
faqs: Is Freecropimage really free?
Yes. Completely free with no signup or watermarks.
Which aspect ratio presets are included?
Instagram post (1:1), Instagram story (9:16), Twitter header, YouTube thumbnail (16:9), LinkedIn profile, Facebook cover, and custom.
Can I enter a custom aspect ratio?
Yes. Type any ratio (e.g., 4:3 or 21:9) or exact pixel dimensions.
Does it rotate or flip images?
Basic rotation (90° increments) is supported. For rotation at arbitrary angles, a dedicated editor works better.
What input formats does it accept?
JPG, PNG, WebP, and GIF.
Are images uploaded?
No. All cropping is done in your browser.

tools.name: Freewordcounter
tools.title: Word Counter
tools.seoTitle: Free Online Word Counter — Character, Sentence, Reading Time
tools.metaDesc: Live word and character counter in your browser. Sentences, paragraphs, reading time, speaking time. No signup, no ads.
tools.h1: Free Online Word Counter — live word and character counts
tools.hero: Type or paste text and see live counts for words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, reading time, and speaking time. No signup, ad-free.
features: Live word and character counts (with and without spaces)
Works in any language with whitespace-separated words
Character counts work for CJK (Chinese, Japanese, Korean)
howItWorks: Open freewordcounter.app
Type or paste text into the input area
See live counts update as you type
Copy the cleaned text if needed
useCases: Essay writing with strict word limits
Blog posts targeting a specific length
Tweet or LinkedIn post drafts within character limits
Reading time estimation for content planning
tools.comparison: WordCounter.net is the most common result but ads and trackers are heavy. Freewordcounter has neither. Microsoft Word and Google Docs have built-in word counts but opening them requires more setup. For quick counts on pasted text, Freewordcounter is fastest.
tools.privacyNote: Text is processed in your browser. Nothing is sent anywhere.
faqs: Is Freewordcounter free and ad-free?
Yes. 100% free with no ads, no trackers, no signup.
Does it work in languages other than English?
Yes. Any language with space-separated words works for word counts. Character counts work for all languages including CJK.
What reading speed does it use?
Default 200 words per minute for reading time, 130 WPM for speaking time. These are industry-standard averages.
Is my text sent anywhere?
No. Everything happens in your browser.
Can I count words in a specific selection?
Select text within the input area and the count updates to reflect the selection.
Does it handle pasted rich text?
Yes. Pasted formatted text has formatting stripped for accurate counting.

tools.name: Freecaseconverter
tools.title: Case Converter
tools.seoTitle: Free Case Converter — UPPER, lower, Title, snake_case, camelCase
tools.metaDesc: Convert text between UPPER, lower, Title, Sentence, snake_case, kebab-case, camelCase, PascalCase, and more. Free, no signup.
tools.h1: Free Case Converter — 10 transformations for any text
tools.hero: Convert text between 10 case formats: UPPER, lower, Title, Sentence, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE, and inverted. All in one click.
features: UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case
howItWorks: Open freecaseconverter.app
Type or paste text
Click the case button you want
Copy the result
useCases: Converting variable names between programming conventions
Creating snake_case identifiers from regular text
Converting between data formats with different case styles
tools.comparison: ConvertCase.net has ads. Programming-specific converters handle only some transformations. Freecaseconverter has all 10 common transformations on one page, ad-free.
tools.privacyNote: All conversions happen in your browser. No network requests.
faqs: Is Freecaseconverter free?
Yes. Free with no signup, ads, or limits.
What is the difference between Title Case and Sentence case?
Title Case capitalizes major words (like in article titles). Sentence case capitalizes only the first letter of each sentence.
What is CONSTANT_CASE?
Uppercase with underscores between words. Used for constants in many programming languages (e.g., MAX_BUFFER_SIZE).
Does it handle accented characters?
Yes. Unicode-aware — é, ñ, ü, etc. convert correctly.
Is there a character limit?
No. Works on arbitrary text length (bounded by browser memory).
Can I chain conversions?
Yes. Apply one conversion, then another, to reach a specific output.

tools.name: Freeloremipsum
tools.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
tools.seoTitle: Free Lorem Ipsum Generator — By Paragraphs, Words, Characters
tools.metaDesc: Generate lorem ipsum placeholder text by paragraph, sentence, word, or exact character count. Ad-free, no signup.
tools.h1: Free Lorem Ipsum Generator — placeholder text for any design need
tools.hero: Generate classic lorem ipsum placeholder text. Pick by paragraphs, sentences, words, or exact character count. Optional HTML tags for mockups.
features: Generate by paragraphs, sentences, words, or character count
Optional HTML wrapping (p, li, div, etc.)
Copy to clipboard with one click
howItWorks: Open freeloremipsum.app
Choose generation unit (paragraphs, sentences, words, characters)
Enter how many to generate
Copy the result to your design or mockup
useCases: Filling design mockups with placeholder text
Testing layouts before real content is written
Generating test data for content systems
tools.comparison: Lipsum.com has ads. Hipsum.co generates themed variants (hipster, pirate) but similar ad model. Freeloremipsum is ad-free and adds exact-character-count generation that most alternatives don't offer.
tools.privacyNote: Generation happens in your browser. No network requests.
faqs: Is Freeloremipsum really free?
Yes. Ad-free and no signup.
Is the generated text real Latin?
It's classic "Cicero-derived" lorem ipsum — scrambled Latin-like text that has no actual meaning.
Can I generate an exact number of characters?
Yes. Specify exact character count and the generator truncates accordingly.
Can I wrap in HTML tags?

Yes. Optional wrapping in

,

  • ,
    , or other HTML tags for design mockups.
Does it work offline?
Yes. After first load, it's a PWA and works without internet.
Can I start with "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet" or other variations?
Yes. Default starts with the classic opening. Toggle for random position within the source text.

tools.name: Freejsonformatter
tools.title: JSON Formatter
tools.seoTitle: Free Online JSON Formatter — Format, Validate, Minify JSON
tools.metaDesc: Free JSON formatter in your browser. Format, validate, and minify JSON with syntax highlighting and error detection. No signup.
tools.h1: Free JSON Formatter, Validator, and Minifier
tools.hero: Paste JSON and get pretty-printed output with syntax highlighting. Invalid JSON shows exact line and error. Minify mode produces compact output.
features: Format and pretty-print JSON with indentation
Minify JSON to single-line compact form
Live error highlighting with line numbers
No signup, no uploads to server
howItWorks: Open freejsonformatter.app
Paste JSON into the input
See formatted output with validation instantly
Copy formatted or minified version
tools.comparison: JSONLint is a classic choice but ad-supported. JSON Viewer Pro and similar extensions add features but require installation. Freejsonformatter is ad-free, browser-native, and works offline.
tools.privacyNote: JSON stays in your browser. Nothing is sent to any server — important when working with sensitive API data.
faqs: Is Freejsonformatter free?
Yes. Ad-free with no signup.
Is my JSON uploaded to a server?
No. Everything happens in your browser. Safe to use with proprietary or confidential JSON.
What JSON syntax errors does it detect?
Missing quotes, trailing commas, unclosed brackets, invalid escape sequences, and more.
Can I format deeply nested JSON?
Yes. No depth limit. A tree view helps navigate nested structures.
Does it handle JSONC (JSON with comments)?
Standard JSON rejects comments. For JSONC or JSON5, use dedicated tools.
Can I convert JSON to YAML?
Not yet. For YAML conversion, use dedicated JSON-to-YAML tools.

tools.name: Freebase64
tools.title: Base64 Encoder/Decoder
tools.seoTitle: Free Base64 Encoder/Decoder Online — Text and Files
tools.metaDesc: Encode and decode Base64 for text and files. Works in your browser. No signup, no upload. Private by design.
tools.h1: Free Base64 Encoder and Decoder — text and files
tools.hero: Encode text or files into Base64 and decode Base64 back to text or binary. No signup. All processing is client-side.
howItWorks: Open freebase64.app
Paste text or drop a file
Choose encode or decode
Copy the Base64 string or download the decoded file
useCases: Creating data URIs for embedding images in HTML/CSS
Encoding binary files for email or text-only transports
tools.comparison: Base64encode.org works well but has ads. Command-line tools like `base64` are developer-friendly but not always available. Freebase64 combines browser convenience with ad-free experience and file encoding support.
tools.privacyNote: All encoding and decoding happens in your browser. Useful for sensitive data like API keys or auth tokens that shouldn't be sent to a third-party service.
faqs: Is Freebase64 free?
Yes. Free and ad-free with no signup.
Can I encode files, not just text?
Yes. Drop any file to get its Base64 representation.
Is there a size limit?
Bounded by browser memory. Typical files (up to tens of megabytes) encode fine.
Is my data sent anywhere?
No. Entirely client-side.
Does it support URL-safe Base64?
Yes. Toggle between standard and URL-safe (base64url) variants.
Can I decode a JWT?
Use the Base64 decode feature on each JWT segment (header, payload) to see the underlying JSON. Signature is binary and typically not human-readable.

tools.name: Freeregextester
tools.title: Regex Tester
tools.seoTitle: Free Regex Tester — Live Match Highlighting, Capture Groups
tools.metaDesc: Test regular expressions with live match highlighting, capture groups, and flags. JavaScript regex. Free, no signup.
tools.h1: Free Regex Tester — live match highlighting and capture groups
tools.hero: Test JavaScript regex patterns with live match highlighting as you type. See capture groups, toggle flags, get match count. No signup.
features: Flag toggles (g, i, m, s, u, y)
howItWorks: Open freeregextester.app
Type a regex pattern in the input
Paste test text in the text area
Watch matches highlight live, see capture groups
useCases: Extracting data from text with capture groups
tools.comparison: RegExr is the gold standard with community-shared patterns and a massive cheatsheet. Regex101 supports multiple flavors (Python, PHP, Go, PCRE). Freeregextester is simpler — ad-free JavaScript regex testing on one page.
tools.privacyNote: Patterns and test text stay in your browser. Safe to test against sensitive data.
faqs: Which regex flavor does Freeregextester use?
JavaScript regex (ECMAScript). Same as what runs in browsers and Node.js.
Can I test Python or PCRE regex?
Not directly. For Python or PCRE, use Regex101 which supports multiple flavors.
Does it support named capture groups?
Yes. ECMAScript named capture groups (?<name>...) work.
Can I test substitution?
Yes. Enter a replacement pattern and see the transformed output live.
Is there a regex cheatsheet?
A basic reference is included inline. For deeper reference, consult MDN's regex documentation.
Is my test data sent anywhere?
No. Testing happens entirely in your browser.

tools.name: Freediffchecker
tools.title: Diff Checker
tools.seoTitle: Free Online Diff Checker — Side-by-Side Text Comparison
tools.metaDesc: Compare two texts side-by-side with added and removed lines highlighted. Free, ad-free, works in your browser.
tools.h1: Free Diff Checker — compare two texts side by side
tools.hero: Paste two texts and see a side-by-side diff with added lines green and removed lines red. Useful for code review, config comparison, and document revisions.
features: Word-level diff for changes within lines
howItWorks: Open freediffchecker.app
Paste original text in the left input
Paste new text in the right input
Differences highlight automatically
useCases: Comparing two versions of a config file
Checking edits to a written draft
tools.comparison: DiffChecker.com is the most common result but has ads and an upsell to a paid tier. Freediffchecker is the same core functionality, ad-free and unlimited.
tools.privacyNote: Both texts stay in your browser. Safe for sensitive content comparison.
faqs: Is Freediffchecker free?
Yes. Ad-free, no signup, no usage limits.
Does it diff code with syntax highlighting?
Diffs are line-based. For language-specific syntax-aware diffs, use git diff or IDE diff tools.
Can I ignore whitespace differences?
Yes. Toggle "ignore whitespace" to focus on substantive changes.
Is there a file-size limit?
Bounded by browser memory. Typical diffs up to thousands of lines perform well.
Are my texts uploaded?
No. Everything happens in your browser.
Can I diff three-way (like git merge)?
Not yet. This tool is two-way diff only.

tools.name: Freesqlformatter
tools.title: SQL Formatter
tools.seoTitle: Free SQL Formatter — Beautify Queries, No Signup
tools.metaDesc: Free SQL formatter and beautifier. Dialect-aware for PostgreSQL, MySQL, T-SQL, SQLite. No signup, no upload to servers.
tools.h1: Free SQL Formatter — beautify queries in your browser
tools.hero: Paste minified SQL and get clean indented output. Dialect-aware for PostgreSQL, MySQL, T-SQL, SQLite, Oracle. No signup, no server upload.
features: Minify option for embedding in code

Yes. Ephemeral rooms stay active as long as your tab is open. For truly long-term team channels, use Slack or Discord.

tools.name: Freepasswordgenerator
tools.title: Password Generator
tools.seoTitle: Free Strong Password Generator — Customizable, Cryptographically Secure
tools.metaDesc: Generate cryptographically strong random passwords. Customize length, character sets, exclude ambiguous characters. Free, private.
tools.h1: Free Strong Password Generator — cryptographically secure randomness
tools.hero: Generate strong random passwords using the browser's Web Crypto API. Customize length, character sets, and exclude ambiguous characters. Passwords never transmitted.
howItWorks: Open freepasswordgenerator.app
Set desired length and character sets
Generate — the password appears only on your screen
Copy and paste into your password manager or the service's signup field
useCases: Creating strong passwords for new accounts
Replacing weak passwords during security audits
tools.comparison: Password managers (1Password, Bitwarden, LastPass) include built-in generators but require the app. Random-password-generator.com and similar have ads. Freepasswordgenerator is the clean ad-free no-install option.
tools.privacyNote: Passwords are generated in your browser using the Web Crypto API. The generated password appears only on your screen and is never transmitted or logged.
faqs: Is Freepasswordgenerator free?
Yes. Ad-free, no signup.
Are the passwords truly random?
Yes. Uses crypto.getRandomValues() which the browser backs with a cryptographically secure random number generator.
Are passwords sent anywhere?
No. Everything is client-side. The password is generated in your browser and displayed only to you.
What length should I pick?
12-16 characters with mixed case, digits, and symbols is sufficient for most uses. 20+ for critical accounts.
Should I use this instead of a password manager?
Password managers store and autofill passwords across devices. Freepasswordgenerator is for one-off generation. Use both together: generate here, store in your manager.
What are "ambiguous characters"?
Characters that look alike in some fonts: 0 (zero) vs O (letter), l (lowercase L) vs 1 (one), I vs l. Excluding them makes passwords easier to type from a printed copy.

They join by entering the password — no signup for them either
Draw, type, drop images. Everything syncs in real time. Drawings never touch a database.
useCases: Throwaway whiteboarding without setting up a shared account
tools.comparison: Compared to Miro and Mural — those are heavyweight enterprise tools with persistent boards, infinite features, and account requirements. Freedrawboard is instant: no signup, password-protected rooms. For ongoing team workspaces use Miro; for quick collaborative sketches use freedrawboard. Compared to Excalidraw, freedrawboard's real-time sync works without an Excalidraw+ subscription. Compared to Google Jamboard (discontinued in 2024), freedrawboard fills the no-account quick-collab gap.
tools.privacyNote: Drawings are relayed through Supabase Realtime but never stored on any database. The password is the room identity — without it, the URL leads to a different empty channel. Local board copies live in your browser and persist across refreshes; export to PNG to keep a permanent copy.
faqs: Is freedrawboard.app really free?
Yes. 100% free with no signup, no ads, and no usage limits. Create as many boards as you want.
How does collaboration work?
Create a board to get a strong auto-generated password. Anyone with that password can join the same board from any device. Drawings sync in real-time.
Are my drawings stored on a server?
No. Drawings are relayed through Supabase Realtime but never written to any database. Your local copy lives in your browser's localStorage.
Can I keep my drawings permanently?
Yes. Click Export to save the canvas as a PNG to your device. The browser-stored copy persists across refreshes for the same device, but for cross-device or long-term keeping, export is the way.
How is freedrawboard different from Miro or Excalidraw?

Miro requires accounts and is heavyweight. Excalidraw is excellent for solo drawing but real-time collaboration requires a paid subscription. Freedrawboard is instant — no account, password-protected rooms.
Does it work on mobile?
Yes. Touch drawing works on phones and tablets. Installable as a Progressive Web App for offline use of single-user mode.

tools.title: Loan Calculator
tools.name: Freeloancalc
tools.cardDesc: Calculate loan payments, amortization schedules, and interest breakdowns for free.
tools.seoTitle: Free Loan Calculator Online — Payments, Interest & Amortization
tools.metaDesc: Calculate loan payments, total interest, and amortization schedules for free. No signup required.
tools.h1: Free Loan Calculator — Calculate Payments and Amortization Instantly
tools.hero: Enter your loan amount, interest rate, and term to see your monthly payment, total interest, and full amortization schedule. Supports 15 currencies, extra payment modeling, and CSV export. No signup, no ads.
features: Real-time monthly payment calculation as you type
Total interest and total paid breakdown
Donut chart showing principal vs interest split
Extra monthly payment analysis with savings display
Loan presets: mortgage, auto, personal, student
howItWorks: Enter your loan amount, interest rate, and term
See your monthly payment and total cost instantly
Add extra monthly payments to see interest savings
View the full amortization schedule month by month
Export the schedule as CSV for your records
useCases: Calculate mortgage payments before buying a home
Compare auto loan terms at the dealership
Model the impact of extra payments on any loan
tools.comparison: Unlike Bankrate or NerdWallet calculators, freeloancalc.app has zero ads, zero affiliate offers, and zero data collection. Your numbers stay on your device. It updates in real time as you type, supports 15 international currencies, and includes a full exportable amortization schedule with extra payment modeling.
tools.privacyNote: All calculations happen locally in your browser using JavaScript. No financial data is sent to any server, stored in any database, or shared with anyone. Your numbers never leave your device.
faqs: How is my monthly loan payment calculated?

Your monthly payment is calculated using the standard amortization formula: M = P[r(1+r)^n]/[(1+r)^n-1], where P is the loan amount, r is the monthly interest rate, and n is the total number of payments. freeloancalc.app computes this instantly when you enter your loan details.
What is an amortization schedule?

An amortization schedule is a table showing each monthly payment broken down into principal and interest portions over the life of the loan. Early payments are mostly interest, while later payments go mostly toward principal.
How does the interest rate affect my total payment?
Even small changes in interest rate significantly affect total cost. For example, on a $300,000 30-year mortgage, a 1% rate increase adds roughly $60,000 in total interest.
Can I calculate extra payments to pay off my loan faster?
Yes. freeloancalc.app includes an extra payment field that shows how additional monthly payments reduce your total interest and shorten your loan term.
Is my financial data safe with freeloancalc.app?
Absolutely. Everything is processed locally in your browser. No data is sent to any server or shared with anyone.
What types of loans can I calculate?
freeloancalc.app works for any fixed-rate loan: mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, student loans, and business loans.

tools.metaDesc: Convert HTML to PDF for free in your browser. Paste code or upload files, preview live, download PDF. No signup.
tools.h1: Free HTML to PDF Converter — Turn Code into PDF Instantly
tools.hero: Paste HTML code or upload an .html file, preview the rendered output live, configure page size and margins, and download a high-quality PDF. All conversion runs in your browser — your code never leaves your device.
features: Paste HTML or upload .html files with drag-and-drop
Live preview updates as you type
6 page sizes: A4, Letter, Legal, A3, A5, Tabloid
5 built-in templates: resume, invoice, report, letter, blank
Ctrl+Enter keyboard shortcut for PDF generation
howItWorks: Paste HTML code or upload an .html file
Preview the rendered output in the right panel
Choose page size, orientation, margins, and quality
Click Download PDF or press Ctrl+Enter
PDF downloads with filename from your HTML title tag
useCases: Convert HTML invoices to professional PDF documents
Generate PDF resumes from HTML templates
Create print-ready reports from HTML source
Preview and export HTML email designs as PDF
Convert HTML documentation to downloadable PDFs
tools.comparison: Unlike wkhtmltopdf, freehtmltopdf.app requires zero installation and runs in any browser. Unlike PDFShift and other paid APIs, it is completely free with no signup, no usage limits, and no server uploads. Your HTML stays on your device for maximum privacy.
tools.privacyNote: All conversion happens locally in your browser using JavaScript. Your HTML code and generated PDFs never leave your device. No data is sent to any server.
faqs: How do I convert HTML to PDF for free?

Paste your HTML code into the editor on freehtmltopdf.app, preview the rendered output, choose your page size and orientation, then click Download PDF. Everything runs in your browser with no server uploads.
Is freehtmltopdf.app safe and private?
Yes. All conversion happens locally in your browser using JavaScript. Your HTML code and generated PDFs never leave your device. No data is sent to any server.
Can I upload an HTML file instead of pasting code?
Yes. Click the Upload button or drag and drop any .html file directly onto the editor panel. The file contents will load into the editor and the preview updates automatically.
What page sizes does freehtmltopdf.app support?
freehtmltopdf.app supports A4, Letter, Legal, A3, A5, and Tabloid page sizes in both portrait and landscape orientation, with adjustable margins from none to 30mm.
Does the converter support CSS styling?

Yes. Inline CSS, internal stylesheets, and most CSS properties are supported. The converter renders your HTML with full CSS styling before converting to PDF. Flexbox layouts work well; CSS Grid has limited support.
Do I need to sign up or install anything?
No. freehtmltopdf.app works instantly in any modern browser with no signup, no installation, and no account required. It also works offline after the first visit.

tools.name: Freetexttospeech
tools.title: Text to Speech
tools.cardDesc: Convert any text to natural speech instantly in your browser — 50+ voices, free, no sign-up.
tools.seoTitle: Free Text to Speech Online — freetexttospeech.app
tools.metaDesc: Convert text to natural speech free in your browser. 50+ voices, adjustable rate and pitch, download audio. No sign-up, no uploads.
tools.h1: Free Text to Speech Online — Listen to Any Text Instantly
tools.hero: Paste any text, pick a voice, and hear it read aloud. freetexttospeech.app runs entirely in your browser using the Web Speech API — no sign-up, no uploads, no character limits.
features: 30–100 voices from your OS and browser, grouped by language
Adjustable rate (0.5× to 2×), pitch, and volume sliders
Play, pause, resume, and stop controls
Current-word highlighting as the reader speaks
Download synthesised audio as a .webm file (Chrome/Edge)
Read selection only, or the whole textarea
Keyboard shortcuts: Space to play/pause, Esc to stop
Works offline as an installable PWA
Zero uploads — all synthesis runs client-side
howItWorks: Open freetexttospeech.app in any modern browser
Paste or type the text you want to hear
Pick a voice from the dropdown (grouped by language)
Adjust rate, pitch, and volume to taste
Click Play — the current word is highlighted as it's read
Optionally click Download audio to save a .webm file
useCases: Listen to long articles or essays while doing chores
Revise lecture notes on the go during commutes
Proofread your own writing by hearing it read back
Give low-vision or dyslexic readers an audio companion
Practice pronunciation in a language you're learning
Generate quick voice-overs for personal videos or slides
tools.comparison: Unlike NaturalReader, freetexttospeech.app has no daily minute cap and no sign-up. Unlike TTSMP3, it has no ads, no character limit, and runs entirely in your browser instead of on a server. For studio-quality neural voices, the Pro upgrade on freesuite.app matches paid tools like ElevenLabs at a fraction of the cost.
tools.privacyNote: Every piece of text you paste stays on your device. freetexttospeech.app has no backend — synthesis happens in your browser using the Web Speech API. No text, audio, or settings are ever uploaded.
faqs: Is freetexttospeech.app really free?

Yes. freetexttospeech.app is completely free with no sign-up, no watermarks, and no character limits. It runs in your browser using the built-in Web Speech API, so there are no server costs to pass on to you.
Does my text get uploaded anywhere?
No. All speech synthesis happens locally in your browser. Your text never leaves your device. freetexttospeech.app has no backend and collects no data.
How many voices are available?

The voices come from your operating system and browser. Most modern setups offer 30 to 100 voices across dozens of languages. macOS and iOS have the highest-quality voices out of the box. Chrome on any platform also loads extra Google voices.
Can I download the audio as an MP3?

freetexttospeech.app can record the speech output to a .webm audio file in browsers that support MediaRecorder on synthesised audio. Support varies — if your browser does not expose the synth stream, the download button will tell you.
What languages are supported?
Every language your operating system ships voices for — typically English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, Hindi, and many more.
Does it work offline?
Yes. After your first visit, freetexttospeech.app caches itself via a service worker. The browser's built-in voices work offline on most platforms.
